title: Sponsor Fulfillment Workflow
excerpt: Would love to see examples of how organizations are using monday to track fulfillment of sponsor assets. We see lots of ways to implement the CRM elements of monday but are a bit stuck conceptualizing how to take things …

posts.author: kgreenRRP (Kirsten Green)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see examples of how organizations are using monday to track fulfillment of sponsor assets. We see lots of ways to implement the CRM elements of monday but are a bit stuck conceptualizing how to take things into the fulfillment stage such as; this account needs a full page ad in the fall issue of our publication, a logo on this page of our website, and they’re the title sponsor of X.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kgreenRRP - Welcome to the community! I would love to help you brainstorm on some potential ways to set this up. It would be easiest to do live on a Zoom call together. You can book a time here: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

We offer a limited number of free strategy sessions each week in the community.

~ Deb Cinkus
Product-certified Partner

Join our unofficial community chat on Discord: The Monday Neighborhood
